title: AttributeResetFix
description: A mod that fixes issue MC-179940 for 1.20.x. Attributes now persist upon death. Max health also received an additional fix.
body:
This mods mainly fixes a long standing issue [MC-179940](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-179940), where attributes are not kept upon death. While fixed in 24w20a, it still remains in 1.20.x. Along with that, another problem we noticed is when setting the `minecraft:generic.max_health` value lower than what it currently is, it would not update _visually_. This mod applies 0.1hp of fall damage to force-update the healthbar.

### Incompatibilities Any mod using attributes to (temporarily) modify player stats is likely to not work as expected with this mod installed. - Trinkets: Dying with a trinket that modifies an attribute will persist, even if trinket is lost upon death. ([Issue #1](https://github.com/Blunthorn-Modding/attributeresetfix/issues/1)) --- [![Blunthorn Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33bd81aa6ae82fa38ca94fa6bcfc55562920de23.png)](https://discord.gg/8z63AhuDZg)
